search_candidates.query: ARKO Arkora Hydro Tbk. annual report 2025 pdf official
search_candidates.title: Annual Report 2025 | Hydro
search_candidates.content: When you choose aluminium from Hydro, it's strong, light, durable and climate efficient, making you part of a smarter and more sustainable future. Today, we are pioneering the green aluminium transition through renewables and new energy solutions. We want to contribute to the just and green transition through responsible production, creating circular solutions and delivering net-zero aluminium by 2050 or earlier. By supporting our employees’ growth professionally and personally, we are fostering a community of colleagues who are united in the shared purpose of solving our industries’ most pressing challenges. With more than a century of industrial experience, we are enabling the green transition through innovation, technological advances, and a strong commercial mindset. Hydro is a leading aluminium and renewable energy company that builds businesses and partnerships for a more sustainable future. # Integrated Annual Report 2025: Increasing resilience to reach 2030 ambitions. Hydro's Integrated Annual Report for 2025 combines financial and sustainability reporting. ## Annual Report 2025.

search_candidates.title: Annual report 2024 | Hydro
search_candidates.content: When you choose aluminium from Hydro, it's strong, light, durable and climate efficient, making you part of a smarter and more sustainable future. Hydro has been at the forefront of the energy transition since 1905, transforming industries and societies with renewable energy. Today, we are pioneering the green aluminium transition through renewables and new energy solutions. By supporting our employees’ growth professionally and personally, we are fostering a community of colleagues who are united in the shared purpose of solving our industries’ most pressing challenges. With more than a century of industrial experience, we are enabling the green transition through innovation, technological advances, and a strong commercial mindset. # Integrated annual report 2024: Accelerating the green aluminium transition. Hydro is on a solid path executing on our 2030 ambition of pioneering the green aluminium transition, powered by renewable energy. ## Accelerating the green aluminium transition. ## Hydro's Integrated Annual Report 2024. ## Annual Report 2024.
